text:
When doing make USE_CDROM=yes in /usr/ports/editors/staroffice5 I get

===>   staroffice-5.1a depends on executable: unzip - found
ln: illegal option -- v
usage: ln [-fs] file1 file2
       ln [-fs] file ... directory

Fix: Apply this patch:
How-To-Repeat: 
As described.
